results.title: Databar.ai Reviews (2026) | Product Hunt
results.content:
Report

 7 views

•1 review

I have been using this app for several months now, and look, I didn't know what I was getting into. As a novice in data scraping, this saved time, money, and stress. This app not only goes above and beyond with all its integrations, enrichments, workflows, templates, accurate, actual validated data, and personalization but also with phenomenal customer service and customer experience. After getting the app for some time and being stuck, I contacted customer service, and I got on a call within 24 hours. After the call, I noticed I was talking to the Founder (David), and I was surprised in a good way because I would've thought there would be a team. David is a seasoned expert and wowed me with his expertise, patience, and professionalism.

results.title: Latenode : Build powerful AI agents | Create AI teams
results.content:
drag-and-drop interface(2)

extensive integrations(2)

no-code functionality(2)

•1 review [...] I've tried a bunch of "No Code" automation tools, but this one is hands down the best. I ended up using it for my Content Automation System, and it's been a game-changer. The ability to write your own code has been a huge time-saver and has allowed me to set up scenarios exactly how I want them. It's cost effective if you are building basic automations. That being said, LateNode doesn't let you make raw API calls without being forced into block-style “toy” selectors. We are moving away from LateNode because its rigid block-style expression system and limited JavaScript node capabilities made it unnecessarily difficult to handle dynamic data, especially for assembling large AI prompts from modular components. The lack of proper array/object manipulation, poor documentation, inconsistent [...] Launched on August 1st, 2025
